articles.author: Jordain Carney, Kelsey Brugger, Meredith Lee Hill
articles.title: House Republicans huddle with Hegseth after Trump’s reconciliation demands - Politico
articles.description: The meeting comes after the president said he wants the next party-line package to include a massive cash infusion to the Pentagon and the SAVE America Act.

articles.author: Gregory Svirnovskiy
articles.title: Trump threatens to take Iran oil infrastructure, hit country ‘VERY HARD TONIGHT’ - Politico
articles.description: Even as the president’s latest threats point toward escalation, Trump himself seemed to pull back amid concerns that Americans might not support a widening war.
articles.content: The presidents interview came less than an hour after he wrote on Truth Social that the U.S. intends to continue striking Iran on Thursday night and floated Venezuela as a model for managing the Midd… [+4921 chars]
